return(function(k,R,J,w,l,o,p,i,t,f,x,S,L,q,Z,K,m,b,d,O,j,r)i,m,K,t,q,Z,f,d,j,r,L,b,x,S,O=function(k)S[k]=S[k]-(805485+-805484)if S[k]==-62783-(-62783)then S[k],j[k]=nil,nil end end,function(k,V)local end,{},function(k,V)local R=x(V)local J=function(...)return Z(k,{...},V,R)end return J end,function(k,V)local R=x(V)local J=function(J)return Z(k,{J},V,R)end return J end,-463622+463622,function(k)for
